description: A dramatic seascape depicting sunset over a rocky coastline. The red-orange sun sits low on the horizon, partially veiled by dark clouds that break open to reveal bands of warm golden and green light. Waves crash and churn over dark rocky outcrops in the foreground, their crests catching blue and white highlights. The sea stretches to the horizon in deep greens and greys. The foreground rocks are rendered in dark silhouette. The overall mood is one of powerful natural forces under a magnificent twilight sky.
